name: ofl-font-baker
description: Composite font builder — merge English & Japanese typefaces

scripts.build: npm run build:preload && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.start: rm -f python/dist/merge_fonts && npm run build && electron .
scripts.dev: rm -f python/dist/merge_fonts && npm run build:preload && npm run build:main && concurrently -k "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:preload" "while ! curl -s http://localhost:5173 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.3; done && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.python:build: python3 -m PyInstaller --onefile --name merge_fonts --distpath python/dist --workpath python/build --specpath python --hidden-import fontTools.varLib.instancer --hidden-import fontTools.pens.cu2quPen --hidden-import fontTools.pens.transformPen --hidden-import fontTools.pens.ttGlyphPen --hidden-import fontTools.pens.recordingPen --hidden-import fontTools.pens.pointPen python/merge_fonts.py
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run python:build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run python:build && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.python:publish: cd python && rm -rf dist && python3 -m build && twine upload dist/*

author: Yamato Iizuka <me@yamatoiizuka.com>
